initial_draft:
The other player has proposed a trade of 1 X for 40 ZUP. Since my maximum willingness to pay is 60 ZUP, and the proposed price is within my budget, I will consider this trade.

<proposal count> 1 </proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 100 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 60 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> The proposed price is within my budget and meets my goal of acquiring the X resource. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
<message> The proposed price is acceptable. I accept the trade. </message>
